headline: Q4 Earnings Highs And Lows: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Vs The Rest Of The Gas and Liquid Handling Stocks
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q4 behind us, let’s have a look at Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) and its peers.
